prerequisites: A Cal.com API key created in your Cal.com settings.
Your Cal.com organization ID (orgId) to set as the required connector configuration field.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Cal.com API key supplied in the required api_key secret field. The key is sent in the Authorization header as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY) over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Create a Cal.com API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Cal.com and create an API key in your settings. Treat the key as a secret and do not commit it to public locations such as source control or client-side code.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste the key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it in the Authorization header as a Bearer token to authenticate every request.

setupSteps.title: Set your organization ID
setupSteps.body: Enter your Cal.com organization ID in the required orgId configuration field. Both api_key and orgId are required to configure the source.
